events.desc_en: Hosted by London Cantonese Opera Culture Association, this grand Cantonese opera concert gathers celebrated opera artists from Hong Kong, Macau and Foshan. The show features classic Cantonese arias and full selected excerpts from the iconic opera The Romance of Purple Hairpin, showcasing authentic Lingnan opera culture. Performance starts at 12 noon on Sunday 6 September 2026 at Shaw Theatre.
events.desc_zh: 倫敦粵韻曲藝文化協會呈獻《粵韻悠揚之紫釵傾情》粵劇演唱會，匯集港澳佛山資深粵劇名伶，上演多首經典粵曲及全套《紫釵記》精選折子戲，推廣嶺南傳統戲曲文化。2026 年 9 月 6 日中午 12 時於 Shaw Theatre 開演。
events.body_en:
London Cantonese Opera Culture Association proudly presents Melodious Cantonese Opera: The Romance of Purple Hairpin, a cultural event to promote traditional Chinese Cantonese opera art.
This grand Cantonese opera concert gathers top-tier opera performers from Hong Kong, Macau, Foshan and London. The performance features classic Cantonese opera excerpts, including well-loved standalone aria scenes and full segments from the iconic masterpiece The Romance of Purple Hairpin.
The event will be held on Sunday 6th September 2026, starting at 12:00 noon at Shaw Theatre in central London. Audiences can enjoy authentic Cantonese opera singing, elaborate traditional costumes and exquisite stage performances, immersing themselves in the timeless charm of Lingnan opera culture.
events.body_zh:
倫敦粵韻曲藝文化協會主辦《粵韻悠揚之紫釵傾情》推廣中國文化粵劇演唱會。
本次大型粵劇匯演雲集香港、澳門、佛山及倫敦各地一線粵劇名伶，演出多首經典粵曲彩唱選段，以及粵劇經典名著《紫釵記》全套精選折子戲。
活動將於 2026 年 9 月 6 日（星期日）中午 12 時正，倫敦市中心 Shaw Theatre 隆重上演。觀眾可欣賞正宗粵曲唱腔、華麗傳統戲服與細緻舞台演繹，感受嶺南戲曲綿延千年的獨特韻味。
events.programme_en:
Palace Dream of Hibiscus After Ten Years - Li Jianglin, Huang Aihuan (Costume Performance)
Wang Pinggui Bids Farewell to His Wife - Zhu Zhenhua, Deng Libing (Costume Performance)
Dream Meeting by Luo River - Liu Yuemei, Liang Zidan
Pursuing Wife from "Sword Gift at Hundred Flowers Pavilion" - Xu Daidi, He Qinglian
Picking Up the Hairpin to Tie the Bond (Excerpt from The Romance of Purple Hairpin) - Li Jianglin, Wang Gedan, Cao Xiulin
Oath in the Flower Courtyard (Excerpt from The Romance of Purple Hairpin) - Li Jianglin, Wang Gedan, Cao Xiulin
Intermission
Song of Pipa - Xie Jinxia, Chen Xiuying
Thousands of Miles, One Old Friend, One Thousand Moons - Mai Jingbiao, Yuan Xiaoping
Willow Farewell at Yangguan (Excerpt from The Romance of Purple Hairpin) - Li Jianglin, Wang Gedan, Cao Xiulin
Meeting the Hero Before the Flowers (Excerpt from The Romance of Purple Hairpin) - Zhu Zhenhua, Liang Zidan, Cao Xiulin
Sword Reunites the Hairpin (Excerpt from The Romance of Purple Hairpin) - Li Jianglin, Wang Gedan, Zhu Zhenhua, Cao Xiulin

events.learn_en:
Immersive experience of authentic traditional Cantonese opera art
Appreciate classic excerpts from the famous Cantonese opera The Romance of Purple Hairpin
Enjoy live performance by award-winning cross-border Cantonese opera masters
Learn about Lingnan traditional Chinese opera culture
events.learn_zh:
沉浸式感受正宗傳統粵劇藝術魅力
欣賞經典名劇《紫釵記》全套精選折子戲
一睹跨城資深粵劇名伶同台現場演出
深度認識嶺南傳統戲曲文化

粵韻飄香 · 揚聲倫敦

about.en: Carrying Cantonese opera to a London stage
Yuet Wan London is a non-profit cultural association dedicated to preserving and sharing the living art of Cantonese opera and music in the United Kingdom.
about.zh: 倫敦粵韻曲藝文化協會是一個非牟利文化團體，致力在英國保存及傳承粵劇與粵樂這門活的藝術。

about.en: “To convey feeling through art, and to cultivate people through culture.”

Cantonese opera — 粵劇 — is a UNESCO-recognised art form that weaves together song, music, movement and storytelling refined over centuries in the Lingnan region of southern China.

Through performances, workshops and community events, we bring artists and audiences together — supporting practitioners in the UK while introducing new audiences to its beauty.
about.zh:
粵劇是聯合國教科文組織認定的藝術形式，融合唱、做、唸、打，於嶺南地區歷經數百年淬煉而成。

透過演出、工作坊與社區活動，我們連繫藝術家與觀眾 —— 既支持在英的從業者，亦向新觀眾介紹粵劇之美。

about.en: Performances
Staging full Cantonese opera productions and music evenings with live ensemble accompaniment.
about.zh: 舉辦完整的粵劇演出及粵樂晚會，並以現場樂隊伴奏。

about.en: Workshops & classes
Hands-on sessions in singing, movement and percussion for newcomers and enthusiasts of all ages.
about.zh: 為各年齡層的初學者及愛好者，提供唱腔、身段及擊樂的實作課程。

about.en: Community
Talks, demonstrations and cultural exchanges that connect the heritage with new generations in the UK.
about.zh: 透過講座、示範及文化交流，把這份傳統承傳予英國的新世代。

about.en: Showcase 2025 — our first full production on a London stage.
about.zh: 《粵韻飄香揚英倫 2025》 —— 我們在倫敦舞台的首場大型演出。

about.en: In September 2025 we presented our inaugural showcase at the Shaw Theatre in London: a thirteen-segment programme of classic Cantonese opera excerpts and music, performed by visiting and UK-based artists.
about.zh: 2025 年九月，我們於倫敦邵氏劇院呈獻首場演出：十三個經典粵劇選段及粵樂節目，由訪英及在英藝術家共同演出。

Be part of the next performance
Whether you'd like to perform, learn, volunteer or support — we'd love to hear from you.
about.zh: 無論您希望演出、學習、做義工或支持我們，都歡迎與我們聯絡。
